query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN eligibility LIKE '%B-2 Visa%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as b2_visa_format,
  SUM(CASE WHEN eligibility LIKE 'Ages%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ages_format,
  SUM(CASE WHEN eligibility = '' OR eligibility IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as empty_eligibility
FROM grants WHERE isActive=1;
